message:
feat(fp-frame): add DataFrame.quantile_axis1/argmin_axis1/argmax_axis1 (frankenpandas-0gc3)

Three new per-row reducers across numeric columns:

- quantile_axis1(q) — linear-interpolation quantile over each row's
  numeric cells. Matches pd.DataFrame.quantile(q, axis=1). Rejects
  q outside [0,1]; rows with no numeric values emit Null(NaN).
- argmin_axis1() / argmax_axis1() — Series of column names locating
  the extremum per row, matching
  pd.DataFrame.idxmin(axis=1)/idxmax(axis=1). Ties resolve to the
  first column seen in column_order (stable). All-missing rows emit
  Null(NaN). Shared arg_extrema_axis1 helper keeps the two paths
  symmetric.

Tests:
- df_quantile_axis1_matches_median_at_q_half
- df_quantile_axis1_rejects_out_of_range
- df_quantile_axis1_empty_row_is_null
- df_argmin_axis1_returns_column_name
- df_argmax_axis1_returns_column_name
- df_argmin_axis1_all_missing_row_is_null

Co-lands frankenpandas-c9or (argmin/argmax axis=1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
